# True Maple Leaf

> True Maple Leaf (truemapleleaf.com) is a free Canadian trivia game. Every hour, all
> players get the same synced set of 10 questions across three categories: Canada,
> pop culture, and sports (hockey, baseball, football, swimming, and soccer). Players
> can start instantly with no sign-up, and can optionally save a streak and a spot on
> their city's leaderboard by picking a game name.

## Key facts

- Free to play. No account required to start; a game name (and optional email) saves
  streak and leaderboard rank.
- New synced question set every hour, same for every player, so friends, family, and
  coworkers can compete on identical questions.
- Categories: Canada (history, geography, government, culture), pop culture (Canadian
  music, film, TV, celebrities), and sports (Blue Jays baseball, Canadian/NHL hockey,
  CFL football, Summer McIntosh and other Canadian Olympic swimmers, plus soccer).
- Streaks, XP, and city/province leaderboards reward daily play. There is no gambling,
  no purchasing of chances, and no cash or prize payout of any kind.
- Results can be shared as an image card showing score and rank.

## Independence and accuracy

True Maple Leaf is an independent, privately run entertainment website. It is not
affiliated with, endorsed by, sponsored by, or connected to the Government of Canada,
any provincial or municipal government, FIFA, Major League Baseball, the Toronto Blue
Jays, the CFL, the NHL, or any other league, team, broadcaster, or official body. The
brand mark is an original stylised star, not a maple leaf or any official flag or logo.
All trivia questions are original and written for entertainment; team, league, and
athlete names are used only as factual references. Questions are for entertainment and
may occasionally contain errors — verify anything important against a primary source.

## Pages

- Homepage: https://truemapleleaf.com/ — play the hourly trivia round, view the
  leaderboard, sign up to save a streak.
- About: https://truemapleleaf.com/about.html — who built it, independence and legal
  disclaimers, how the game works.
- Privacy Policy: https://truemapleleaf.com/privacy.html
- Terms of Service: https://truemapleleaf.com/terms.html
- Canada trivia: https://truemapleleaf.com/canada-trivia.html
- Canada Day trivia: https://truemapleleaf.com/canada-day-trivia.html
- Canadian pop culture quiz: https://truemapleleaf.com/canadian-pop-culture-quiz.html
- Toronto trivia: https://truemapleleaf.com/toronto-trivia.html
- Vancouver trivia: https://truemapleleaf.com/vancouver-trivia.html
- Calgary trivia: https://truemapleleaf.com/calgary-trivia.html
